subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received, and the effect of thy pen brought spiritual joy, for it indicated [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید و اثر خامه فرح روحانی بخشید زیرا دلالت بر آن
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
